section.heading: Reports
section.chapeau: Not later than 1 year after December 26, 2025, and annually thereafter through March 30, 2034, the Secretaries shall submit a report that describes the progress made by the Secretaries with respect to meeting the requirements of this chapter to—

paragraph.content: the Committee on Natural Resources of the House of Representatives;
the Committee on Energy and Commerce of the House of Representatives;
the Committee on Agriculture of the House of Representatives;
the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources of the Senate; and
the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry of the Senate.
